title: VS Code Server installation guide
snippet: Purpose of this guide is to provide a step-by-step installation process for Visual Studio Code server on Linux systems. This guide will help you set up VS Code server for remote development in web interface.Installation Via GitHub releases  Go to temp directory and create a directory named code-s...

title: Install docker on Ubuntu Server
snippet: Installation  Update apt packagesudo apt updatesudo apt install -y ca-certificates curl  Add Docker’s official GPG key:sudo install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyringssudo curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.ascsudo chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc  ...
